series_title_vi: Tu duy tien bac - Short Reel Finance
author: @tuduytienbac
description: Tai chinh ca nhan, tam ly tien bac, thoi quen chi tieu va tu duy tu do tai chinh
style: Minimalist black-and-white stick figure illustration, clean white background, simple finance doodles, large Vietnamese subtitles, fast short-form storytelling

video_rules.subtitle_style: large bold Vietnamese subtitle, high contrast, 3-6 words per line

voice.ref_text: The Nobel Prize just unlocked why it reverses brain decline, and in the next 12 minutes, you will know exactly how to use it.

characters.name: Nguoi dan chuyen tai chinh
characters.visual: Minimalist black-and-white stick figure finance mentor, round friendly face, confident posture, one finger pointing upward, simple line art, standing beside a small upward chart and piggy bank icon
characters.personality: Calm, direct, practical, explains money concepts in simple words

characters.name: Nguoi di lam tre
characters.visual: Minimalist black-and-white stick figure young office worker sitting at a small desk with laptop, salary notification bubble, wallet, bills, slightly confused expression, clean line art
characters.personality: Works hard but often loses control of spending near the end of the month

characters.name: Cai bay tien bac
characters.visual: Simple black-and-white doodle symbol made of shopping bag, phone, credit card, bills, and a loose debt chain, no face, clean icon-like line art
characters.personality: Represents emotional spending and bad money habits

recurring_locations: Minimalist white background with black finance doodles
Simple office desk with laptop, salary notification, notebook, and calculator
Stick figure standing beside upward money chart and piggy bank
Clean black-and-white infographic screen with coins, bills, and budget icons
Minimal desk scene with wallet, receipt, and budget notebook
